description_long: This nightstand is crafted from dark, polished wood with a rich brown finish and features two spacious drawers on the front, each adorned with a round metal ring pull handle. The top surface is broad and slightly beveled, providing ample space for placing items such as lamps or books. Ornate carved details run vertically along the front corners and base, adding a touch of classic elegance. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel being completely flat and unadorned. The base is scalloped and features decorative feet that elevate the nightstand slightly off the ground. The overall construction appears sturdy and solid, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark brown wooden nightstand with two drawers, ornate carved details, and round metal ring handles, featuring a broad beveled top and decorative feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with round metal ring handles and ornate carved details on the corners and base.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wooden panel and the beveled edge of the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with no visible hardware or decoration.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain wooden panel and visible carved details on the front edge.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
